prose:
Method provenance:
Property: Gas-phase molecular dipole moment of ammonia. Level of theory: GFN2-xTB (semi-empirical tight-binding) using the xtb backend, density‐fitted by construction. Geometry: user-supplied ammonia.xyz (no geometry optimization; single-point electrostatics evaluation). Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent). Charge 0, multiplicity 1. Software: xtb via chemkit electrostatics skill. SCF converged; no engine warnings.

Result:
Dipole moment = 1.8774299 Debye.

The Mulliken partial charges (GFN2-xTB) sum to the molecular charge within tolerance (check passed). The live log and full JSON, including the exact cli_invocation, are available in the run directory referenced by chemkit.
